title: elymus arenarius var. sabulosus
intro: Elymus arenarius var. sabulosus, also known as the sand-loving wheat-grass or coastal wheat-grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to coastal areas and sandy dunes in Europe and Asia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Elymus arenarius var. sabulosus include its ability to aid in the treatment of gastrointestinal disorders, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
